scope: current repository capability and evidence state; software fixtures are not scientific validation

rows.feature: Report-first PID estimate eligibility and abstention
rows.known_limitations: The high-dimensional MI/coherence route is NO-GO and continuous shared-exclusions atoms on real VLA embeddings remain application-blocked; an abstention is not a zero estimate.
rows.evidence_scope: pinned pid-rs producer and Prisoma consumer tested together on positive and abstaining fixtures

rows.known_limitations: The current deterministic bridge smoke does not implement every target UI, VLA, backend control, authenticated caller policy, or versioned subscription stream.
rows.evidence_scope: local JSON-RPC dispatch and contract fixtures

rows.known_limitations: Checked inputs are synthetic fixtures; emitted geometry and PID diagnostics do not establish population, measure, estimator, or application validity for real embeddings.
rows.evidence_scope: deterministic local fixture, strict split/provenance, and replay paths

rows.known_limitations: Only the bounded synthetic canonical NPZ/JSON ingress is fixture-tested; real released SAFE capture/export, model rights, semantic hook validation, and scientific gates remain open.
rows.evidence_scope: content-addressed synthetic ingress and strict local conversion fixture

rows.known_limitations: Content hashes prove the exact checked bytes, not that advertised proof commands passed outside CI, that command text exercises every declared input, or that a software row has scientific validity; those require review and execution.
rows.evidence_scope: offline schema, path-safety, semantic-level, and generated-drift checks

rows.known_limitations: The overlay is a dated offline review of public evidence; it cannot rule out private branches and requires manual refresh whenever an endpoint or contract changes.
rows.evidence_scope: local integrity and canonical-prose checks, not promotion of every listed edge

rows.known_limitations: No blinded comparison against an ordinary script, MCAP/rosbag2, LeRobot/RLDS, and Rerun-only stack has been executed; EC1 is not complete.
rows.evidence_scope: canonical benchmark design only

rows.feature: H1 pre-treatment lineage and diagnostic-noninterference preflight
rows.known_limitations: The checked policy and instrumentation chain is representative synthetic software only; no real policy timing equivalence, causal freeze, or H1 evidence follows.
rows.evidence_scope: content-addressed positive and fail-closed local fixtures

rows.known_limitations: This finite synthetic benchmark identifies only paired algorithmic response under its clone/coupling contract; it is not a physical individual effect, real intervention, or H1 result.
rows.evidence_scope: deterministic PID-free local arithmetic and replay fixture

rows.known_limitations: No real assignment generator, randomized episode capture, ITT/receipt execution, effect-specific learner, pilot, or held-out result exists.
rows.evidence_scope: causal estimand and validation design only

rows.known_limitations: The real event ontology, landmark, minimum useful effect, matched-access comparator frontier, prospective capture, training-only alarm selection, and external/temporal holdout remain unfrozen or unexecuted.
rows.evidence_scope: censoring-aware prospective study specification only

rows.known_limitations: Synthetic arithmetic does not establish prospective prediction, calibration validity, warning benefit, censoring assumptions, comparator superiority, safety gain, or deployment validity.
rows.evidence_scope: grouped train-only complete/censored/failure local fixtures

rows.known_limitations: The small reference model and deletion-AOPC control are logging/software groundwork; attribution agreement is not causal use, and no real VLA intervention study exists.
rows.evidence_scope: local reference-model probe and canonical attribution event fixture

rows.known_limitations: No MCAP/rosbag2 or LeRobot/RLDS import/export implementation and conformance fixture exists; local JSON/NPZ paths are not substitutes unless explicitly justified and benchmarked.
rows.evidence_scope: format selection and conformance requirements only

rows.known_limitations: SAFE and self-generated simulator fixtures do not supply the required second independent adapter or E4 replication; no candidate has passed promotion.
rows.evidence_scope: adapter-promotion contract and EC1 requirement only

rows.known_limitations: The 18 frozen scenarios are a finite local fixture; whole-tick omission is a known native blind spot and no live timing, QoS, reconnect, authentication, ACL, security, E4, or EC1 result follows.
rows.evidence_scope: immutable NCP contract pin plus tested local route/decoder/finalization/replay fixtures; no conforming external producer is compiled, so this is not producer-consumer E3

rows.known_limitations: No conforming public live producer provides honest L, split, episode, and outcome structure; open/secure choice is declared but live security and noninterference are unvalidated.
rows.evidence_scope: immutable NCP contract pin plus tested workspace-excluded local consumer fixtures; no conforming external producer is compiled, so this is not producer-consumer E3

rows.known_limitations: This is the canonical shared implementation, not independent corroboration; high-dimensional nuisance tests are NO-GO and current real-embedding shared-exclusions application validity is blocked.
rows.evidence_scope: immutable pid-rs pin plus its estimator test fixture; the tested status is separate and does not claim a producer-consumer E3 adapter

rows.known_limitations: No reconstruction-quality measurement contract, validated posterior/predictive observation law, active-view implementation, or empirical study exists; it is optional nuisance-analysis design only.
rows.evidence_scope: prospective covariate, stratification, sensitivity, and view-study design

rows.known_limitations: The retained expression is a rejected heuristic without a named population functional, derivation, support/positivity conditions, consistency result, calibrated interval, or oracle evidence; it must not be implemented as written.
rows.evidence_scope: rejected/quarantined non-implementation record; deferred denotes unavailable, not planned delivery

rows.known_limitations: No pinned consumer-owned adapter, executable fixture, rights-approved model/data bundle, matched-support study, or E4 result exists; generated scenes are not causal ground truth and this comparator is off the critical path.
rows.evidence_scope: optional external-service interface and provenance requirements only

rows.feature: Canonical run-log validation, replay, manifest, and sidecars
rows.known_limitations: Local exact-event replay and sidecar checks do not supply policy/controller/simulator/physical replay evidence or the external negative-case benchmark required by EC1.
rows.evidence_scope: pinned pid-runlog producer and Prisoma consumer tested together on schema-2 validation/replay fixtures

rows.known_limitations: The scripted push-to-goal fixture is a deterministic software cross-check, not a real VLA policy/environment choice, external adapter, validated simulator, or physical repeatability study.
rows.evidence_scope: immutable registry dependency plus feature-gated local physics/manipulation tests; status carries the tests separately

rows.known_limitations: No runnable shell or custom renderer exists; it is a Phase-4 product surface and explicitly not a thesis dependency.
rows.evidence_scope: roadmap and architecture decision only

rows.known_limitations: The converter surfaces current summary/provenance/validation and attribution tracks, but the complete Phases 1-3 diagnostic blueprint and viewer are not built.
rows.evidence_scope: immutable registry dependency plus local validating conversion/replay tests; status carries the tests separately

rows.known_limitations: Only conversion groundwork is runnable; the complete time-machine panels, heatmaps, interaction blueprint, and viewer acceptance tests remain unimplemented.
rows.evidence_scope: viewer design and current-versus-target boundary only
